functions.name: prorate_premium
functions.bug_description: Uses fixed 365 divisor instead of actual days in year (366 for leap years) per ISDA actual/actual convention

functions.name: apply_tiered_tax
functions.bug_description: Assignment (=) instead of accumulation (+=) in tax loop — only keeps the last bracket's contribution instead of summing all brackets

functions.name: schedule_maintenance
functions.bug_description: Uses AND instead of OR for flight hours and cycles check — requires both to exceed limits instead of either one

functions.name: calculate_dilution
functions.bug_description: Option pool calculated on post-money shares instead of pre-money — understates founder dilution per option pool shuffle convention

functions.name: interpolate_rate
functions.bug_description: Uses linear interpolation instead of log-linear (logarithmic) interpolation as specified in the docstring
